raw_consumer_statement:
I filed a credit card dispute with my credit card company ( Citibank ) and the dispute was closed before I was allowed to provide any supporting documentation. The only information I was allowed to provide was the amount of the transaction and the date. 

I initiated the dispute on XX/XX/year>. I contacted the dispute department on XX/XX/XXXX inquiring if I could provide additional details ( chat transcripts, screenshots, receipts, etc. ) The customer service representative told me that they would contact the merchant first and then contact me for more information. 

I was alerted on XX/XX/year> that the Merchant had been contacted. I was alerted on XX/XX/XXXX that the Merchant had Responded. 

On XX/XX/XXXX I was informed that " We've Completed Our Investigation. The Matter has been Resolved - Customer Responsible. '' I had never been contacted to share my side of the dispute. The matter was decided between the credit card company and the merchant only.
